subcodes.first_line: The spirit of praise and its essence befitteth the most hallowed and exalted sanctuary of the Best-Beloved One, Who from the wellspring of the Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روح حمد و جوهر آن ساحت امنع اقدس حضرت محبوبی را سزاست که از معین قلم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @chastisement and requital, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
